meaning: n.水果,果实,果类,成果vi.结果实
examples: They eat mainly fruit and nuts.
The fruit are small and round.
The fruit was drowned in cream.
Instead of fruit-tree wood, the ducks here are cooked in an oven with straw as fuel.
Roadside carts sell snacks and drinks, from fruit punch to arepas (corn cakes) and salted green mango.
